auth.not_provisioned_body: This email is not registered. Ask an administrator to add your account before signing in.

login.hero_body: Experience the synergy of human intuition and artificial intelligence. Your journey towards cognitive excellence begins here.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Continue your learning journey with your Google account.
login.oauth_only: aBridgeAI currently supports Google OAuth only. New approved users are created through the Google sign-in flow.

sr_dashboard.title: Review dashboard
sr_dashboard.intro: Track your review progress, see today's due cards, and unlock new lessons when you're ready.
sr_dashboard.no_courses_title: You are not enrolled in any course yet
sr_dashboard.no_courses_body: Contact your instructor to be enrolled in a course and begin your review path.
sr_dashboard.card_intro: Tap to view per-lesson review progress
sr_dashboard.no_lessons: This course has no lessons yet.

course_detail.unavailable_body: This course isn't open or has been temporarily hidden.
course_detail.ai_mock_body: Complete each module to unlock an AI-powered mock interview. Get real-time feedback, adaptive follow-up questions, and a detailed assessment of your technical explanations.

settings_security.title: Account security
settings_security.intro: Manage two-factor authentication (TOTP) and recovery codes for your account.
settings_security.two_factor_intro: Add an extra layer of protection with a TOTP authenticator app.
settings_security.recovery_codes_intro: Generate a fresh set of recovery codes. The old set is invalidated immediately.
settings_security.scan_qr_title: Scan the QR with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, ...)
settings_security.regen_panel_intro: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to regenerate recovery codes.
settings_security.save_codes: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each code is single-use and you cannot view them again after leaving this page.

toasts.challenge_failed: Couldn't create challenge. Please try again.

career_paths_page.title: Shape your future.
career_paths_page.intro: Discover career paths designed by your organization's expert team.
career_paths_page.load_failed_body: Please try again in a few minutes.
career_paths_page.empty_body: When managers publish new paths, they will appear here.

courses_list.title: Discover courses.
courses_list.intro: Explore AI-curated courses that shorten your journey from learner to expert.
courses_list.section_subtitle: Browse the full library and learn at your own pace
courses_list.load_failed_body: Please try again in a few minutes.
courses_list.empty_no_courses_body: Courses will appear here once published.
courses_list.empty_no_match_body: Try adjusting your search keywords to see more courses.

dashboard.explore_intro: Explore the catalog to start your learning journey.
dashboard.your_courses_sub: Pick up where you left off
dashboard.empty_notifications_body: When quizzes, interviews, or course updates arrive, they will appear here.
dashboard.empty_courses_title: You are not enrolled in any course yet
dashboard.empty_courses_body: Contact your instructor or training office to be enrolled in a course that matches your path.
dashboard.ready_body: Finish your enrolled courses, take AI-generated quizzes, and practice realistic interview scenarios — everything is tracked and personalized to your learning path.
